channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: msitarzewski /agency-agents | Shell | N/A
item.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

item.title: TencentCloud /CubeSandbox | Rust | N/A
item.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.

item.title: supabase /supabase | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: agentskills /agentskills | Python | N/A
item.description: Specification and documentation for Agent Skills

item.title: obra /superpowers | Shell | N/A
item.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

item.title: ogulcancelik /herdr | Rust | N/A
item.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

item.title: anthropics /claude-code | Python | N/A
item.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

item.title: pytorch /pytorch | Python | N/A
item.description: Tensors and Dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration

item.title: rommapp /romm | Python | N/A
item.description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager and player.

item.title: facebook /astryx | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: ansible /ansible | Python | N/A
item.description: Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier to deploy and maintain. Automate everything from code deployment to network configuration to cloud management, in a language that approaches plain English, using SSH, with no agents to install on remote systems.https://docs.ansible.com.

item.title: actions /checkout | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Action for checking out a repo

item.title: elastic /elasticsearch | Java | N/A
item.description: Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

item.title: JuliusBrussee /caveman | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: 🪨 why use many token when few token do trick — Claude Code skill that cuts 65% of tokens by talking like caveman

item.title: openai /codex-plugin-cc | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

item.title: usestrix /strix | Python | N/A
item.description: Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.
